message:
chore(fwc): clippy fixes and idiomatic Rust improvements across test suites

Apply idiomatic Rust patterns caught by clippy and manual review:

- test_observability.rs: replace collect-then-len with iterator .count()
  for UUID part validation; remove unnecessary .clone() on moved values
- truth.rs: replace direct f64 equality (==) with epsilon-based
  comparison for floating-point confidence values to avoid
  clippy::float_cmp warnings; use Duration::from_secs(5) instead of
  Duration::from_millis(5000) for clarity
- cual_integration.rs: remove 5 unnecessary .clone() calls on values
  that are moved immediately after; apply lifetime elision to
  operator_truth_fixture_bundle_suite; add clippy::too_many_lines allow
  on assert_operator_truth_fixture_contract to suppress false positive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
